'''âg-l-n-h''' ('''kagalnehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vade|vade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vade|vade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-l-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagalnehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalnehoko|thigalnehoko]] || [[word:jigalnehoko|jigalnehoko]] || [[word:shigalnehoko|shigalnehoko]] || [[word:kigalnehoko|kigalnehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalnehoko|thuthugalnehoko]] || [[word:jujugalnehoko|jujugalnehoko]] || [[word:shushugalnehoko|shushugalnehoko]] || [[word:kukugalnehoko|kukugalnehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugalnehoko|thugalnehoko]] || [[word:jugalnehoko|jugalnehoko]] || [[word:shugalnehoko|shugalnehoko]] || [[word:kugalnehoko|kugalnehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugalnehoko|thugalnehoko]] || [[word:jugalnehoko|jugalnehoko]] || [[word:shugalnehoko|shugalnehoko]] || [[word:kugalnehoko|kugalnehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegalnehoko|thegalnehoko]] || [[word:jegalnehoko|jegalnehoko]] || [[word:shegalnehoko|shegalnehoko]] || [[word:kegalnehoko|kegalnehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogalnehoko|thothogalnehoko]] || [[word:jojogalnehoko|jojogalnehoko]] || [[word:shoshogalnehoko|shoshogalnehoko]] || [[word:kokogalnehoko|kokogalnehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogalnehoko|thogalnehoko]] || [[word:jogalnehoko|jogalnehoko]] || [[word:shogalnehoko|shogalnehoko]] || [[word:kogalnehoko|kogalnehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogalnehoko|thogalnehoko]] || [[word:jogalnehoko|jogalnehoko]] || [[word:shogalnehoko|shogalnehoko]] || [[word:kogalnehoko|kogalnehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚgalnehoko|thĂŚgalnehoko]] || [[word:jĂŚgalnehoko|jĂŚgalnehoko]] || [[word:shĂŚgalnehoko|shĂŚgalnehoko]] || [[word:kĂŚgalnehoko|kĂŚgalnehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagalnehoko|thathagalnehoko]] || [[word:jajagalnehoko|jajagalnehoko]] || [[word:shashagalnehoko|shashagalnehoko]] || [[word:kakagalnehoko|kakagalnehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagalnehoko|thagalnehoko]] || [[word:jagalnehoko|jagalnehoko]] || [[word:shagalnehoko|shagalnehoko]] || [[word:kagalnehoko|kagalnehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagalnehoko|thagalnehoko]] || [[word:jagalnehoko|jagalnehoko]] || [[word:shagalnehoko|shagalnehoko]] || [[word:kagalnehoko|kagalnehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
